title: Shinjis Tape Player
wikitext:
[]: Shinji's Tape Player.... (Spoilers... Kinda...)             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Tue Aug 04, 2009 11:03 pm Shinji's SDAT was seen as like some sort of weird addiction in the series to me, and I never quite understood it's relevance. One thing I did notice though (which I know, is very apparent and added in on purpose), was the fact that it stops at 26 tracks. Same as how the anime stops at 26 episodes. Now we come to the Rebuild series. I don't speak Japanese, and I don't have any subtitles to go by, so while watching the crappy camrip that I couldn't stop myself from viewing because I have a fucking problem I tend to pay very close attention the best I can visually. Right before the scene where Kaji rubs his man meat on Shinji's thigh and confesses his love to him through a gentle whisper you see Shinji's tape player, for yet another time in the RoE series. It goes from track 26 to 27. He says something while studdering somewhat, that which I cannot decipher because I was unlucky enough to be born in America. Anyway, before I ramble further- Quite possibly, this may be the answer, or at least a hint to the answer we've all been looking for as to whether or not RoE takes place after EoE. This could be taken as a symbolic way of saying, "There were 26 episodes. This a continuation of that story. Welcome to episode 27," episode 27 being the entire Rebuild collection. Also, I would like to request that if maybe one of the translators or just someone who speaks Japanese in general could decipher what Shinji mumbles after changing to track 27, it would be greatly appreciated. It may shed some light on this, or it may serve no purpose at all. Well, just a little thought I had. Thought I might share it with the only Eva fanbase I was aware of. Feel free to say things like "No, you're stupid," and "Your mother never loved you," if you feel the need and I'll do my best to return the favor.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Aug 04, 2009 11:08 pm The SDAT was broken (Mari broke it when she landed on him). As for the significance, I sort of remember at some point Shinji was talking about how the SDAT once belonged to Gendo, but that needs sauce that I cannot provide.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Aug 04, 2009 11:11 pm Ornette wrote: The SDAT was broken (Mari broke it when she landed on him). As for the significance, I sort of remember at some point Shinji was talking about how the SDAT once belonged to Gendo, but that needs sauce that I cannot provide.

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Tue Aug 04, 2009 11:25 pm I understand that connection. I've heard the sae before, so you can use me as your sauce (yeah baby). But you guys are failing to touch on the sole purpose of why I posted this in the first place >.<

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Aug 04, 2009 11:43 pm Shinji's puzzled his SDAT doesn't work before Kaji hits on him, then later tells Helltrain Rei the SDAT was Gendo's/given to him by Gendo. It's hard to tell if Rebuild's a sequel or not yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Aug 04, 2009 11:49 pm Kaji... hits... on...? So they extended the "Hey, want some tea?" into something almost inappropriate?

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Wed Aug 05, 2009 12:20 am Monk Ed wrote: Kaji... hits... on...? So they extended the "Hey, want some tea?" into something almost inappropriate?

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Wed Aug 05, 2009 12:43 am Well if it goes to episode 27 I hope we get a Harpie fight, that'd be badass.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Aug 05, 2009 6:54 am wonderluster wrote: Well if it goes to episode 27 I hope we get a Harpie fight

[]: Re: Shinji's Tape Player.... (Spoilers... Kinda...)             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Wed Aug 05, 2009 8:06 am DEMOLITION D+ wrote: Shinji's SDAT was seen as like some sort of weird addiction in the series to me, and I never quite understood it's relevance.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Wed Aug 05, 2009 11:21 am Reichu wrote: wonderluster wrote: Well if it goes to episode 27 I hope we get a Harpie fight

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Aug 05, 2009 11:24 am SaltyJoe wrote: Though this is not a discussion thread about the original series, i always thought that the SDAT player was a form escapism for Shinji, a way of shutting the world out. The symbol of his introversion.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Wed Aug 05, 2009 2:21 pm He really should upgrade to an iPod, Rebuild is supposed to be Eva for the 00's right? But, his addiction to his music is not uncommon in this decade. How many of us have used our MP3 players to tune out the world on occasion? Maybe Anno is trying to use the SDAT player as a subtle social commentary? Edit: By the way, your mother never loved you. ;)

[]: Re: Shinji's Tape Player.... (Spoilers... Kinda...)             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Wed Aug 05, 2009 4:17 pm SaltyJoe wrote: DEMOLITION D+ wrote: Shinji's SDAT was seen as like some sort of weird addiction in the series to me, and I never quite understood it's relevance.

[]: Re: Shinji's Tape Player.... (Spoilers... Kinda...)             Quote Post by LiLi » Wed Aug 05, 2009 4:29 pm DEMOLITION D+ wrote: Also, I would like to request that if maybe one of the translators or just someone who speaks Japanese in general could decipher what Shinji mumbles after changing to track 27, it would be greatly appreciated. It may shed some light on this, or it may serve no purpose at all.

[]: Re: Shinji's Tape Player.... (Spoilers... Kinda...)             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Wed Aug 05, 2009 7:18 pm LiLi wrote: DEMOLITION D+ wrote: Also, I would like to request that if maybe one of the translators or just someone who speaks Japanese in general could decipher what Shinji mumbles after changing to track 27, it would be greatly appreciated. It may shed some light on this, or it may serve no purpose at all.

[]:             Quote Post by obama » Wed Aug 05, 2009 9:55 pm its the hottest new britney spears song that he likes, you guys are thinking too hard

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Wed Aug 05, 2009 9:58 pm Holy Diver wrote: He really should upgrade to an iPod, Rebuild is supposed to be Eva for the 00's right?

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Wed Aug 05, 2009 11:27 pm I was also wondering why Anno didn't gave Shinji the new age 8GB ipod, which you can shake if you want to skip the current playing track, it's a shame he didn't have one. just now, i found out that it is from Gendou... ok, it's a gift from him. but i was wondering, did Shinji ever changed the tape, and is he playing tha same tape over and over again?

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Aug 05, 2009 11:36 pm I do hope that the whole "27" thing is true and it keeps going. I thought that as I watched Rebuild in hopes that maybe it would be true.
